# Test Project

This is a test project for E2E testing with the `existing-rich` fixture.

## Overview

A sample Claude Code project with agents, recipes, and documentation.

## Agents

- **secretary** — Task management and daily coordination
- **developer** — Custom app development and debugging

## Notes

This file is used by KovitoBoard E2E tests to simulate a project
that has already been set up with agents and recipes.
